job_summary: A Risk-Based Monitoring CRA focuses on centralized and risk-driven monitoring approaches to identify, assess, and mitigate risks in clinical trials.
key_responsibilities: Perform centralized monitoring using statistical and data-driven tools
Identify high-risk sites, patients, and data points
Reduce reliance on 100% Source Data Verification (SDV)
Monitor Key Risk Indicators (KRIs) and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Collaborate with data management and biostatistics teams
qualifications: Degree in Life Sciences / Biostatistics / Pharmacy
career_path: RBM CRA → Centralized Monitoring Lead → Risk Manager
skills_required: collaborate with data management and biostatistics teams
identify high-risk sites, patients, and data points
monitor key risk indicators (kris) and key performance indicators (kpis)
perform centralized monitoring using statistical and data-driven tools
